disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prodromal tingling/burning then grouped vesicles on an erythematous base at the vermilion border; recurrent pattern
trigger_question_examples: Did it start with tingling or burning before the blisters, and is it on the lip edge?
Have you had cold sores in the same spot before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it tingled and burned first, then blistered on the lip edge — I've had cold sores before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No eye redness, eye pain or light sensitivity (herpetic keratitis screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is either eye red, painful or sensitive to light?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my eyes are completely fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No widespread punched-out lesions on eczematous skin (eczema herpeticum), no rapidly spreading hot red facial swelling (erysipelas/cellulitis), no mucosal sloughing/target lesions (SJS), no systemic toxicity
trigger_question_examples: Any widespread rash, spreading hot red facial swelling, or blistering/peeling inside the mouth or elsewhere?
Do you feel systemically unwell or feverish?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's just the lip cluster; no spreading redness, no mouth or body rash, and I feel well otherwise.
